entries.description: Researching self-play reinforcement learning for mid-to-mid motion planning in autonomous driving. Current work covers closed-map training, Hermite-spline trajectory actions, CARLA evaluation, PufferDrive experiments, and Waymo-style realism metrics.
Developed multimodal deep learning systems for traffic sign reconstruction, detection, and recognition in autonomous-driving perception pipelines.
Built machine learning, robotics, and simulation projects spanning perception, planning, and intelligent systems.
